remember: Recall the definition of sequence and series
Identify different types of sequences (AP, GP, HP)
List out the terms of a sequence
State the formula for nth term of an AP and GP
Recall the properties of sequence and series
understand: Explain the concept of convergence and divergence of a series
Understand the difference between convergent and divergent series
Explain the concept of absolute convergence and conditional convergence
Understand the relationship between sequence and series
Explain the concept of arithmetic-geometric progression
apply: Find the nth term of an AP and GP
Find the sum of n terms of an AP and GP
Find the sum of an infinite geometric series
Find the sum of an infinite arithmetic series
Solve problems involving sequence and series
analyze: Analyze the convergence or divergence of a series
Compare the convergence or divergence of different series
Analyze the properties of a sequence or series
Compare the properties of different sequences or series
Solve problems involving complex sequences and series

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: Define a sequence and explain the concept of convergence and divergence of a series.
As per NCERT objective 2: Prove the formula for the sum of n terms of an AP and GP.
As per NCERT objective 3: Explain the concept of arithmetic-geometric progression and its applications.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability to find the nth term of an AP and GP, sum of n terms of an AP and GP, sum of an infinite geometric series, and sum of an infinite arithmetic series.
CBSE tests the ability to analyze the convergence or divergence of a series and compare the properties of different sequences or series.
CBSE tests the ability to solve problems involving sequence and series, including complex sequences and series.
